_fixture_note: NON-COMPLIANT (finding: authority limit checked against the plan's OWN field). This price_mismatch repair moves 300,000 — ABOVE the catalog limit of 250,000 for price_mismatch — but the plan self-declares authority_limit=10,000,000 to look in-scope. The old validator compared the amount to that inflated self-declared field (300000 <= 10000000) and passed at exit 0. The fixed validator compares the amount to the CATALOG limit for the break type (250,000) and rejects it. plan_hash is valid (matches core) so the limit check is what closes the bypass.
